mapper.select:
SELECT emp_code, emp_name, tel, email, rank, birth_date, dept_id FROM emp
AND rank= #{rank}
AND dept_id LIKE '%'||#{deptId}||'%'
AND emp_name LIKE '%'||#{empName}||'%'
ORDER BY emp_code DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emp(emp_code, password, emp_name, tel, email, rank, birth_date, dept_id) VALUES (#{empCode},
#{password},
'$2a$10$6SyT5kux10Cl9ZAAzWDkT.Fv523NRs6PdYXqQ6fseai/Y.RD39Tfy',
#{empName}, #{tel}, #{email}, #{rank}, #{birthDate}, #{deptId})
